metadata.description: JUXT plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: allium
plugins.description: An LLM-native language for sharpening intent alongside implementation. Velocity through clarity.

plugins.name: chalk
plugins.description: Capture intent across issues, commits, and PRs — why, not just what.

plugins.name: chill
plugins.description: Interrupt forward momentum and step back to reassess. A circuit-breaker for when Claude is spinning or scope-creeping.

plugins.name: clojure-lsp
plugins.description: Clojure / ClojureScript language server (clojure-lsp + clj-kondo) for code intelligence, refactoring, and analysis.

plugins.name: code-map
plugins.description: Build and query a code-only LSP-based symbol and call-graph map of the current project. A navigation accelerator for multi-file code reasoning.

plugins.name: glance
plugins.description: Pipe long command output through glance for token-efficient summaries instead of reading all tokens.
